CREATE TABLE numbers (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayMax(values) AS max_value FROM numbers;
SELECT arrayMax((x -> (-x)), values) AS neg_max_value FROM numbers;
SELECT id, arrayMax(values) AS max_value FROM numbers WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM numbers WHERE arrayMax(values) > 3);
SELECT arrayMax(arrayConcat((SELECT values FROM numbers WHERE id = 2), (SELECT value AS arr FROM additional))) AS combined_max_value;
SELECT id, arrayMax(values) AS max_value FROM numbers GROUP BY id HAVING max_value > 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, arrayMax(values) AS max_value FROM numbers GROUP BY id HAVING max_value < 5) AS filtered;
